# Thermodynamics

**Summary**: The study of the energy changes associated with the adsorption process.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-alnasser|AlNasser, 2021]] evaluated thermodynamic parameters (Delta G, Delta H, Delta S) for the system.

## Scientific Context

- [[2021-alnasser|AlNasser, 2021]] Determines the nature (physical vs chemical) and spontaneity of the process.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2021-alnasser|AlNasser, 2021]] Calculation from temperature-dependent equilibrium data.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Confirmed the process is spontaneous and endothermic. ([[2021-alnasser|AlNasser, 2021, p. 77]])
